title: VIN VDS rules
description: Per-WMI VDS-decoding rules in NHTSA vPIC shape: each schema lists applicable WMIs (with optional year ranges) and the per-offset patterns that decode the VDS into named feature fields. AND-combined within one schema; OR-combined across schemas (multiple schemas can apply to the same VIN, contributions are merged).

source.description: Free-text source citation; helpful for audit trails.

schemas.description: Map of schema-id -> schema definition. Schema id is opaque (e.g. the vPIC VinSchemaId).

match.description: Regex character class matched against VDS[offset]. Empty / "." / "*" mean any. Bare single char is a literal. "[ABC]" is a class. "[^X]" is a negated class. "X-Z" inside a class is a range.

field.description: vPIC element name (BodyClass, DisplacementL, EngineModel, DriveType, TransmissionStyle, FuelTypePrimary, ElectrificationLevel, AirBagLocFront, GVWR, ...).

value.description: Decoded value applied to the feature field when match holds.
